# terrible_theforeman_foreman_smart_class_parameter (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `parameter` (String) Name of the parameter
- `puppetclass_name` (String) Name of the puppetclass that own the parameter

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `avoid_duplicates` (Boolean) Remove duplicate values (only array type)
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `default_value` (String) Value to use by default.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the Smart Class Parameter
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `hidden_value` (Boolean) When enabled the parameter is hidden in the UI.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `merge_default` (Boolean) Include default value when merging all matching values.
- `merge_overrides` (Boolean) Merge all matching values (only array/hash type).
- `omit` (Boolean) Don't send this parameter in classification output. Puppet will use the value defined in the Puppet manifest for this parameter.
- `override` (Boolean) Whether the smart class parameter value is managed by Foreman
- `override_value_order` (String) The order in which values are resolved.
- `override_values` (String) Value overrides
- `parameter_type` (String) Types of variable values. If `none`, set the parameter type to empty value.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `required` (Boolean) If true, will raise an error if there is no default value and no matcher provide a value.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the entity.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validator_rule` (String) Used to enforce certain values for the parameter values.
- `validator_type` (String) Types of validation values.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `entity` (String) Final state of the affected entities grouped by their type.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
